data.body: Closing as a DUPLICATE of e3d0 (sleek-bur-train). Both describe the same batched-write primitive discovered independently from two now-closed epics (this from the import epic ab74; e3d0 from the bounded-git-growth epic 97e7). e3d0 is the broader superset (wider adoption surface + object-count-growth motivation); 39c5's distinctive details (batch_stage_and_commit shape + crash-resume/idempotent-by-source_id tests) have been folded into e3d0. Work is NOT done — tracked under e3d0. Force-closing as duplicate (closed-without-signature is the correct marker: not validated-as-implemented).
